---
title: "test_uplink.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\crucible\test_uplink.py"
loc: 49
complexity: 3
logic_score: 4.40
style_score: 3.81
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 4.64
---

## Intent
The `test_uplink.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestAntigravityUplink, test_ansi_stripping, test_json_extraction_with_noise, test_payload_transmission, test_uplink_silence_fallback. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestAntigravityUplink, test_ansi_stripping, test_json_extraction_with_noise, test_payload_transmission, test_uplink_silence_fallback. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [unittest](file://unittest)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)

### Exports
- `TestAntigravityUplink`
- `test_ansi_stripping`
- `test_json_extraction_with_noise`
- `test_payload_transmission`
- `test_uplink_silence_fallback`
